# Pricing Page Template

Adapt this template for your SaaS product's pricing page.

---

## Pricing Plans

### Free
**$0/month**

For individuals getting started.

- 1,000 API calls/month
- 100 MB storage
- 1 team member
- Core features
- Community support

[Get Started →]

### Starter
**$29/month** (14-day free trial)

For small teams building products.

- 10,000 API calls/month
- 1 GB storage
- 5 team members
- Advanced analytics
- API access
- Email support

[Start Free Trial →]

### Pro — Most Popular
**$99/month** (14-day free trial)

For growing businesses that need more.

- 100,000 API calls/month
- 10 GB storage
- 25 team members
- Everything in Starter, plus:
- SSO / SAML
- Audit logs
- Custom domain
- Priority support

[Start Free Trial →]

### Enterprise
**Custom pricing**

For organizations with advanced needs.

- Unlimited API calls
- Unlimited storage
- Unlimited team members
- Everything in Pro, plus:
- White-label branding
- SLA guarantee
- Dedicated support
- Custom integrations
- On-premise option

[Contact Sales →]

---

## Feature Comparison

| Feature | Free | Starter | Pro | Enterprise |
|---|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| API calls/month | 1,000 | 10,000 | 100,000 | Unlimited |
| Storage | 100 MB | 1 GB | 10 GB | Unlimited |
| Team members | 1 | 5 | 25 | Unlimited |
| Core features | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ |
| Advanced analytics | — | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ |
| API access | — | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ |
| SSO / SAML | — | — | ✓ | ✓ |
| Audit logs | — | — | ✓ | ✓ |
| Custom domain | — | — | ✓ | ✓ |
| White-label | — | — | — | ✓ |
| Priority support | — | — | ✓ | ✓ |
| SLA guarantee | — | — | — | ✓ |

## FAQ

**Can I switch plans at any time?**
Yes. Upgrades take effect immediately. Downgrades apply at the next billing cycle.

**What happens if I exceed my plan limits?**
You'll receive a notification at 80% usage. Overage charges apply at the per-unit rate for your plan. You can upgrade at any time to increase limits.

**Is there a discount for annual billing?**
Yes — save 20% with annual billing. Contact sales for enterprise annual pricing.

**Do you offer a startup discount?**
Yes — qualifying startups get 50% off the Pro plan for the first year. Apply at [link].

---

*This template maps directly to the Lago billing plans in `packages/skill/templates/lago-plans.json`. Adjust the numbers, features, and copy to match your product.*
